sizing_rule.note: Trade 1 contract per $4 of equity; uses geometric mean thresholds (e.g., $404.24) to adjust position size upward. Formula: Contracts = Total_Equity / 4. This is Vince's optimal f applied discretely via geometric progression.

source_rule_text: Trade 1 contract for every $4 in equity, adjusting position size upward at equity threshold levels determined by the geometric mean.
